name: jig-review
description: Comprehensive review skill that merges Claude Code and Codex findings.

interface.shortDescription: Combined Claude Code and Codex reviews
interface.longDescription: Codex skill for running Claude Code and native Codex review passes over the same scope, then deduplicating and merging findings into one consolidated report. Requires cc-plugin-codex for the Claude review pass: https://github.com/sendbird/cc-plugin-codex.
defaultPrompt: Run a comprehensive review of my current changes
